notes: Non-secret placement only. Credentials and buckets are generated per run inside scripture-correctness-<run-id>.
Never target Tracker RustFS, scripture-lab, or any shared durable lab store.
Preflight must verify the selected RustFS Service namespace/UID/labels/EndpointSlices belong to this run.
Default-deny egress for campaign pods: DNS + in-namespace RustFS Service only.
